rebrand_transform: case-preserving hermes->kopi; plus post-pass hermes-agent/kopi-agent -> kopi-ai-agent (package/repo name)
merge_method: 3-way merge with base = c1b46d9 (kopi's TRUE initial rebranded commit, the real common ancestor), theirs = T(hermes@new_HEAD), ours = kopi main. CRITICAL: base MUST be c1b46d9, not a synthetic T(fork) — a too-new base silently drops upstream code as 'ours deleted it'.
conflict_policy: website/** + i18n kept KOPI's; README.md/install.sh kept KOPI's; .env.example kept KOPI PROXY block + upstream providers; everything else took upstream.
post_merge_checks: restore kopi-own files the 3-way deletes (base has them, upstream doesn't): compare merge deletions vs upstream's real deletions
kopi-agent -> kopi-ai-agent naming pass (skip skills/** and -memory/-setup/-dev/-skill-authoring suffixes)
integrity scan: non-customized files should match T(upstream) modulo brand
rebrand must NOT touch real npm registry package names (hermes-parser, hermes-estree, ...) in package-lock.json / package.json deps — they 404 on npm if renamed
green_ci_runbook: Run these AFTER every merge, BEFORE pushing, so CI passes on the first try (each item is a real failure we hit and fixed; skipping one turns main red). Order matters. 1) LOCKFILES: `uv lock` (pyproject version/deps changed -> uv lock --check is a blocking CI gate and every test slice dies on uv sync --locked) AND `npm install` at repo root (any package.json dep change -> npm ci fails EUSAGE 'Missing X from lock file'; the @playwright/test devDep bit us). 2) VERSION SOURCES: run `scripts/bump-version.sh` (no args) to VERIFY all 5 sources agree (package.json, apps/desktop/package.json, pyproject.toml, kopi_cli/__init__.py, acp_registry/agent.json); the script also re-locks uv.lock + agent.json. A stale agent.json fails tests/acp/test_registry_manifest. 3) BRAND/ORG: `grep -rn 'NousResearch/hermes-agent\|hermes-agent.git' --include='*.py' --include='*.sh' --include='*.ts' --include='*.ps1'` must be empty (source install/update paths must point at kopiagent/kopi-ai-agent, not upstream). 4) STALE INSTALL TESTS: the 13 tests/test_install_sh_*.py + test_install_{diverged_update,lockfile_churn,no_initial_commit,unmerged_index,autostash_conflict_recovery} modules assert the OLD upstream linear installer and MUST stay `pytestmark = skip` (KOPI uses the staged Hermes installer; coverage is tests/test_install_sh_kopi.py). A sync that un-skips them turns CI red. 5) LINT: `npm run fix` at root (eslint --fix + prettier); the js-autofix workflow pushes fixes straight to main now (no AUTOFIX_BOT_PAT), but landing them yourself keeps CI green immediately.
known_noise_failures: These fail LOCALLY on macOS but are NOT regressions and pass on Linux CI (or are optional-dep gaps) — do NOT chase them after a sync: tests/acp/test_edit_approval, tests/tools/test_file_tools*, test_line_ending_preservation, test_cross_profile_guard, test_file_staleness, test_base_environment (macOS /private path + FS semantics); tests/kopi_cli/test_runtime_provider_resolution qwen-oauth token asserts (upstream mock drift); test_voice_mode/test_browser_camofox/test_web_tools_tavily/test_computer_use (optional deps / network). Baseline: ~30 files / ~94 tests fail locally with `scripts/run_tests_parallel.py` on a clean tree. Only investigate NEW files beyond this set. Desktop vitest: 2 flaky UI tests (toolset-config-panel, use-prompt-actions) fail only under parallel load — rerun the file in isolation to confirm before treating as real.
history: f8361d29c approx fork tag region (byte-match, UNRELIABLE — do not use as base)
6997dc81c (synced 2026-07-15, tag hermes-sync-6997dc81c, commit corrected with base=c1b46d9)
f4df260f2 (v7, 239 commits in 4 batches 26480e6c5..86e603e7d..3b4f96ce9..17a99f6b1..f4df260f2; conflicts: inventory.py union, main.ts electron namespace +powerSaveBlocker, kept kopi version/brand/CI)
notes: For the NEXT sync: base stays c1b46d9 (or a fresh clean rebrand-snapshot if you ever re-fork); synced_to_commit (f4df260f2) is the last upstream HEAD pulled. After merging, run green_ci_runbook (above) before pushing, then update this file + create the new hermes-sync-<hash> tag on the marker commit.
rules: version fields are OURS: pyproject.toml version, kopi_cli/__init__.py __version__, package.json + apps/desktop/package.json version follow the KOPI product version (scripts/bump-version.sh) — never take upstream version bumps

lockfiles are DERIVED, never hand-edited and never taken from upstream blindly: after any version or dependency change run `uv lock` (Python) and `npm install` (JS); both --check/ci gates block CI. bump-version.sh re-locks uv.lock + agent.json automatically.

install/update paths stay on OUR repo+domain: kopiagent/kopi-ai-agent and kopiaiagent.com. A sync that reintroduces NousResearch/hermes-agent or hermes.nousresearch.com in scripts/*, kopi_cli/*, apps/desktop/electron/* must be reverted to the kopi values (see green_ci_runbook step 3).

install.sh is the staged Hermes protocol rebranded + one kopi injection (provision_kopi_proxy_key in the config stage). If a sync rewrites it, re-apply the case-preserving rebrand + re-inject provisioning; keep the 13 upstream test_install_sh_* modules skipped.
each hermes-sync-<hash> tag points at that sync's 'bump marker' commit; tags are local-only unless pushed (git push origin --tags).
